rationale_source: F1.FB mortgage_statement source-hierarchy authority per R11-B-2: statement is authoritative within docs-tier for balance/payoff fields

first_mortgage_balance.rationale: Broker silent on balance. loan_app $220k; mortgage_statement $225k (current). R11-B-2: statement authoritative within docs-tier; F1.FB resolves to statement value.

discrepancyHold.rationale: Intra-docs-tier preference per R11-B-2; not cross-tier discrepancy.
